prerequisites.value: Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +5 or monk level 5th.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you use a monk weapon or unarmed strike to attack a creature that is casting a divine spell, the target is sickened for 1d4 rounds. A target can attempt a Fortitude save (DC = 10 + half your character level + your Wisdom modifier) to reduce the duration of the sickened effect to 1 round.
